name: The Club House at Capitol Bar
address: 6100 W State St STE 101, Boise, ID 83703
about: The Club House at Capitol Bar is an indoor golf simulator venue integrated within Capitol Bar, a cocktail and craft bar located on State Street in Boise, Idaho. The venue offers a unique combination of golf simulation and premium beverage service, providing a social environment for golf enthusiasts. While specific technical details about the golf simulation equipment are not readily available on the website, the establishment emphasizes a high-quality experience through its handcrafted cocktails and local craft beer offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Unique integration of golf simulation with a premium cocktail bar
Social atmosphere for playing and post-game drinks
Convenient downtown Boise location for after-work or evening play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available, known for handcrafted classic cocktails and unique keg and can wine offerings
Full bar featuring handcrafted classic cocktails, local craft beers, and wine selections

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to contact the venue directly to inquire about club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so bringing outside food and drink is likely not permitted. However, you can enjoy their handcrafted cocktails and food offerings on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing information for playing 18 holes. Typical simulator rounds can take 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and simulator type.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Capitol Bar is a 21+ establishment, so children are not permitted on the premises.
